name: Barclays PLC
description: Barclays PLC is a major global financial services provider engaged in retail banking, credit cards, corporate and investment banking, and wealth management. Headquartered in London, United Kingdom, the company operates as a transatlantic consumer and wholesale bank with a significant presence in its two home markets of the UK and the US. With over 325 years of history and expertise in banking, Barclays offers a wide range of financial products and services to individuals, corporations, institutions, and governments worldwide.
